note: Before/after pairs. Replace the .svg placeholders with real photo files (jpg/png/webp) and update the paths. before and after are relative to the site base. system and docs are optional.

pairs.caption: The body: oxidized green and rusted at acquisition, silver-blue metallic when finished.
Wheels: original steel with hubcaps, then 911 / Fuchs-style alloys.
The tail: primer and a missing lens, then scripts, chrome, and LED strips.
